basic_details.job_title: RARC Dimapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Regional Ayurveda Research Centre (RARC Dimapur) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the RARC Dimapur office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per central Govt. rules for SC/ST/OBC/PH & persons in Govt. Services.

qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Sc (Botany) from any recognized university.

all_official_links.label: Download RARC Dimapur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for RARC Dimapur JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at RARC Dimapur is scheduled for 29th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is M.Sc (Botany) from any recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per central government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 31,000 per month, plus applicable House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment. Candidates from all categories (General/OBC, SC/ST) are not required to pay any fee.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at the Regional Ayurveda Research Centre, Dimapur.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this RARC Dimapur recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Regional Ayurveda Research Centre (RARC) Dimapur office. The exact address and reporting time will be mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided as per the central government rules for SC/ST/OBC/PH and persons already in government services.
